ai_summary: CLI tool that generates AI-readable project context, tracks meaningful changes, and can publish public project state through GitHub.
implementation_details: REST API architecture using Express routing
Express middleware pipeline for request handling
File system monitoring for automatic project state updates
Structured AI context generation across JSON, Markdown, and instruction files
Git-backed synchronization workflow for publishing project state
Node.js CLI entrypoint for developer-facing automation

recent_updates.impact: Improves how project progress is summarized for AI systems.

key_features: Command-line workflow for project setup and automation
Automatic change tracking with noise filtering
Optional GitHub sync for publishing project context
HTTP endpoints for accessing current project context
